jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Miniklub
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Miniklub. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Miniklub:
Miniklub is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub!
